nasb.text: and Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest was the chief of the leaders of Levi, and had the oversight of those who perform the duties of the sanctuary.

esv.text: And Eleazar the son of Aaron the priest was to be chief over the chiefs of the Levites, and to have oversight of those who kept guard over the sanctuary.

cnv.text: 亞倫祭司的兒子以利亞撒要作利未人眾領袖中的領袖，要監察那些盡看守聖所職分的人。

ccb.text: 亚伦祭司的儿子以利亚撒是利未人的最高首领，负责监督在圣所工作的人。
